testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'Gokuls-MacBook-Air.local', ip: '2406:7400:1c1:1dac:e1a7:5b29:efc2:ab5b%en0'
